caption: Group Management
description: Group Management events report management updates to a group, including updates to membership and permissions and assignment of a role.
name: group_management

1.caption: Assign Privileges
1.description: Assign privileges to a group. Use privileges to be assigned to group.

2.caption: Revoke Privileges
2.description: Revoke privileges from a group. Use privileges to be revoked from group.

3.caption: Add User
3.description: Add user to a group. Use user as the user to be added to group.

4.caption: Remove User
4.description: Remove user from a group. Use user as the user to be removed from group.

5.caption: Delete
5.description: Delete a group. Use group as the group to be deleted.

6.caption: Create
6.description: Create a group. Use group as the group to be created.

7.caption: Add Subgroup
7.description: Add a subgroup to a group. Use the sub_group to add to group.

8.caption: Remove Subgroup
8.description: Remove a subgroup from a group. Use the sub_group to remove from group.

9.caption: Update Group
9.description: Update a group. The updated group details should be populated in the updated_group attribute.

10.caption: Assign Roles
10.description: Assign one or more roles to a group. Use the iam_role_list for the specific roles to be assigned to group.

11.caption: Remove Roles
11.description: Remove one or more roles from a group. Use the iam_role_list for the specific roles to be removed from group.

group.description: Group that was the target of the event.

iam_roles.description: One or more roles assigned to or removed from a group.

privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to the group.

resource.description: Resource that the privileges give access to.

subgroup.description: A subgroup added to or removed from group.

updated_group.description: The intended state of the group after the update. On Success, represents the actual post-update state.

user.description: A user that was added to or removed from group.
